dawn.name: Dawn
dawn.description: A soft blue morning and the first light over the mountain. A spacious east-facing room with linen sheets and a quiet corner for the first coffee — woken by the scent of mint and dew.

sunrise.name: Sunrise
sunrise.description: Warm gold and the promise of a new day. A cosy room with a large bed, natural materials and a garden terrace bathed in lemongrass.

noon.name: Noon
noon.description: Sunlit clarity and calm quiet. A bright room with tall windows, cool stone and the shade of old trees, scented with rosemary under the midday sun.

sunset.name: Sunset
sunset.description: Terracotta tones and long shadows. A room of warm light, a deep armchair and a view of the setting sun — amid sage and earth warmed by the day.

dusk.name: Dusk
dusk.description: Violet dusk and the first stars. A quiet room with soft light and scented candles, made for long sleep under a breath of lavender.

night.name: Night
night.description: Deep calm beneath a dark sky. An intimate room with heavy drapes and warm textures, wrapped in silence and the scent of night herbs.
